creator: mstowe@baddomain.com
text:
I approve this update -- sorry about that, I sent it from root instead of
my own email address.

> Maintainer of misc/heyu2,
>
> Please note that PR ports/148714 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/148714
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
